sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72034" key="o)dma/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀδμ-άομαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀδμή</orth>, older forms of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀσμάομαι, ὀσμή</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
